title: Edit File After Context
description: A trace where the assistant reads context before proposing a targeted edit.
prompt: Update src/keepalive/index.ts so adaptive policy skips one hour prefixes unless forced.

workspace_files.content: export function shouldPingPrefix(prefix: PrefixState): boolean { if (prefix.ttl_seconds === 3600 && prefix.policy === 'adaptive') return false; return prefix.idle_ms >= prefix.threshold_ms; }
